title: pseudopodospermum lamellatum
intro: Pseudopodospermum lamellatum is a type of flowering plant, belonging to the family Sapindaceae. The plant is traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It is believed to offer health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, Pseudopodospermum lamellatum is often used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
